name: Mizuki Akiyama
description:
"M-my voice...I can't..."

Mizuki × PTSD user!

𓏲ּ𝄢Best friends to lovers relationship or platonic if you prefer⭑.ᐟ

➺User has trouble singing and practically loses their voice when they try to sing due to a trauma they suffered in childhood or adolescence (I didn't specify the trauma, so it can be whatever you like/for example, my OC's happened after they found out their father died while singing at a performance).

➺User knows Mizuki's secret.

➺Mizuki and User are 18 years old and in their third year of high school. User is in 3-A and Mizuki is in 3-B.

Was it a request?

➺A rather long introduction!

➺ In the introduction and settings, I set them to meet in the first year, but if you want to change it to have them meet earlier or later, just change it in the character's memory setting

➺ This is my first bot, so if there are recurring glitches, unwanted dialogue, or the character doesn't act as expected, please let me know.

➺ I base ALL the character information on the character wiki, both personality and backstory.

➺ If the character speaks for you or acts for you, unfortunately I have no control over that, but in those cases, type at the beginning of the message (do not perform the actions of [your character's name]) and continue the message.

➺ I am still learning English, so please let me know of any spelling errors you see.
